description: CompositionGrey, blue and red checked half-sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has two chest pockets, a full front buttoned placket, and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careMachine wash in cold water inside out using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishmentsChecks that add immense style to your casual look is what lee brings into your life. Pair it with denims or corduroys and funky footwear for casual looks.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
